policy: Original procedural HTML/CSS/JS implementations inspired by documented mechanics; no third-party media assets are redistributed.

domino_autopsy.influence: Arrange dominoes and test whether a chain reaches its last target.
domino_autopsy.assets: All dominoes, tabletop textures, and the rendered bell assembly are original procedural rendering.
domino_autopsy.runtime: Dominoes, the finite-mass suspended bell, and its constrained clapper use vendored Matter.js 0.20.0 rigid-body motion and collision detection under the included MIT license.

consequences_boss.influence: A later combat decision changes according to earlier moral choices.
consequences_boss.assets: All scenes and symbols are CSS-generated originals.

popup_exorcist.influence: Multiple overlapping popups plus one blocker that can destroy the whole stack.
popup_exorcist.assets: All popup copy, chrome, icons, and effects are original.

funeral_ritual.influence: A multi-step memorial interaction discovered from the single instruction Grieve.
funeral_ritual.assets: All grave, moss, candle, flower, and weather visuals are CSS-generated originals.

slime_commute.influence: WASD crossing through minecarts, water, and moving logs.
slime_commute.assets: All tiles, slime, vehicles, logs, and effects are CSS-generated originals.
